sourcePrompt: An open-air Vietnamese street market stall, about three meters wide and head-high. A simple wooden stand: four rough poles holding up a single slanted awning of faded tarp, a plank counter across the front loaded with produce and goods, and woven baskets and a stacked crate or two at its feet. No walls, all structure. Weathered wood. Low-poly, blocky, modular; simple readable silhouette.
